title: Principal Plant Manager at ACC Limited Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at ACC Limited Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ACC Limited Advisory Limited:
ACC Limited Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
